meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS Starter Kits to Fix Debugging Issues
content.seo_description: Master SaaS development by integrating Antigravity and Claude Code. Overcome debugging bottlenecks and ship professional-grade applications for clients faster.
content.answer_block: Stop chasing ghost bugs in custom architectures. By adopting a hardened SaaS starter kit, you standardize your codebase, leverage battle-tested patterns, and offload complex logic to AI-assisted debugging tools like Antigravity and Claude Code. This shift transforms your workflow from manual troubleshooting to high-velocity, automated feature delivery and rapid deployment.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, your client is waiting, and your codebase has become a labyrinth of untraceable errors. You are stuck in the 'debugging trap,' where fixing one module triggers a cascade of failures in another. It is the silent killer of freelance profitability, turning high-margin projects into endless maintenance sinks.

But what if you could bypass the chaos? By utilizing a pre-validated SaaS starter kit, you shift from architecting in the dark to executing within a proven, resilient framework. Combined with the surgical precision of Antigravity and Claude Code, you don't just fix bugs—you prevent them, allowing you to ship production-ready SaaS products at a pace that keeps your clients coming back for more.

steps.title: Initialize a Hardened Boilerplate
steps.description: Select a production-ready starter kit to establish a consistent architectural foundation, eliminating configuration drift and common dependency issues.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project structure and recommend a modular SaaS boilerplate that minimizes dependency conflicts and supports rapid feature scaling.

steps.title: Implement Automated Error Tracing
steps.description: Inject observability layers into your core services so that bugs are identified via stack traces rather than manual console logging.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure an automated observability wrapper for my API routes that logs context-rich errors to my chosen monitoring service.

steps.title: Define Schema-Driven Contracts
steps.description: Use strict typing and schema validation to prevent type-related runtime errors before code is even deployed.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Zod schemas for my authentication and payment user flows to ensure end-to-end type safety.

steps.title: Execute AI-Driven Regression Tests
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate unit and integration tests for every new feature, ensuring that new code doesn't break existing logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current codebase and generate a comprehensive test suite for the payment processing logic, covering edge cases and error states.

steps.title: Deploy with Continuous Guardrails
steps.description: Set up a CI/CD pipeline that runs your AI-verified test suite before every production push.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs my automated test suite and blocks deployment if any regression or type error is detected.

pro_tips: Always use 'context-injection' when prompting Claude Code; include your project's README and core architectural decisions to reduce hallucinations.
Treat your starter kit as a read-only dependency; never modify the core boilerplate logic unless absolutely necessary to preserve updateability.
Use Antigravity to perform 'diff-based debugging'—compare your failing code against a known-working pattern from the starter kit.
Implement 'Feature Flags' for every new module to isolate bugs in production without rolling back the entire application.
Maintain a 'knowledge-base' file in your repo that Claude Code can index; update it whenever you solve a complex, recurring bug.
content.next_steps: Once your environment is stabilized, focus on automating your client-onboarding flow using the same AI-driven principles to maximize your billable output.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting bugs eat your profit margins and start shipping at the speed of thought. By mastering the synergy between starter kits and AI-assisted debugging, you position yourself as a top-tier engineer in the freelance market. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
